news-global-econ.title: Victor Wembanyama anthem controversy grows as Spurs, NBA and ESPN stay silent during Finals
news-global-econ.description: Victor Wembanyama's national anthem controversy persists as the NBA, Spurs and ESPN remain silent on his Game 1 posture and reported absences.

news-global-econ.title: Prestige Estates plans ₹60,000 crore in project launches
news-global-econ.description: The developer is banking on regulatory approvals to drive a 43% jump in sales value.

news-global-econ.title: America’s baby bust may be linked to the iPhone, study says
news-global-econ.description: A new study suggests the iPhone may account for up to 52% of the decline in U.S. birth rates after 2007 by changing how young people socialize and date.

news-global-econ.title: Bank of Japan Poised to Raise Rates to 31-Year High
news-global-econ.description: Japan’s central bank is widely expected to raise interest rates to 1% to counter the price shock stemming from the Middle East conflict.

news-global-soc.description:
Repent from your evil ways or prepare to go to hell. That was the simple message from Pope Leo on Friday for people traffickers and criminal groups who deliver illegal aliens to Europe through Spain's Canary Islands.

news-global-soc.description: China's Vice Premier defends free trade during a G7 call, addressing economic imbalances and fostering international cooperation.

news-global-soc.title: How to trade the SpaceX IPO in Asia's locked-out markets
news-global-soc.description: With no direct access to the IPO, traders from Seoul to Shanghai are piling into companies along the space supply chain, industry-themed ETFs and Nasdaq 100 Index-tracking funds in hopes of capturing gains
